SEARCH
Package com.example.myapplication

Class ScanQRUnitTest

java.lang.Object
com.example.myapplication.ScanQRUnitTest
public class ScanQRUnitTest extends Object
Tests the logic that handles the QR scan result and passes eventId to EventDetailsFragment The following test file was written with the guidance of Claude AI Prompt: "Write unit tests for US 01.06.01" April 2, 2026

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ScanQRUnitTest()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    testCancelledScan_doesNotTriggerEventDetails()
    Cancelled scan should not trigger showing event details Matches: else { Toast "Scan cancelled" }
    void
    testDifferentQRCodes_produceDifferentEventIds()
    Different QR codes should produce different eventIds
    void
    testEmptyScanResult_isInvalid()
    Empty scan result should be detected as empty
    void
    testEventId_exactlyMatchesScanResult()
    eventId value should exactly match the scanned QR value
    void
    testEventId_isRetrievableFromArgs()
    eventId stored as value in args should be retrievable
    void
    testEventId_notNullAfterValidScan()
    eventId should not be null after a valid scan
    void
    testMissingEventIdKey_isDetected()
    Missing eventId key should be detected Matches: args.containsKey("eventId") returning false
    void
    testNonNullScanResult_isValidScan()
    Non-null scan result should be treated as a valid scan Matches: if (result.getContents() != null)
    void
    testNullArgs_treatedAsMissingEvent()
    Null args should be treated as no event provided Matches: if (args != null invalid input: '&'invalid input: '&' ...) in EventDetailsFragment
    void
    testNullScanResult_isCancelledScan()
    Null scan result should be treated as a cancelled scan Matches: else { Toast "Scan cancelled" }
    void
    testSameQRCode_producesSameEventId()
    Same QR code scanned twice should produce same eventId
    void
    testScannerPrompt_isNotEmpty()
    Scanner prompt text should not be null or empty Matches: options.setPrompt("Press back to cancel")
    void
    testScanResult_storedAsEventId()
    Scanned value should be stored correctly as eventId Simulates: bundle.putString("eventId", scannedValue)
    void
    testScanResult_usedDirectlyAsEventId()
    Scan result should be used directly as eventId without modification
    void
    testValidScan_triggersEventDetails()
    Valid scan should trigger showing event details Matches: if (result.getContents() != null) → show EventDetailsFragment
    void
    testValidScanResult_isNotEmpty()
    Non-empty scan result should not be empty

  • Method Details

    • testNonNullScanResult_isValidScan

      public void testNonNullScanResult_isValidScan()
      Non-null scan result should be treated as a valid scan Matches: if (result.getContents() != null)

    • testNullScanResult_isCancelledScan

      public void testNullScanResult_isCancelledScan()
      Null scan result should be treated as a cancelled scan Matches: else { Toast "Scan cancelled" }

    • testEmptyScanResult_isInvalid

      public void testEmptyScanResult_isInvalid()
      Empty scan result should be detected as empty

    • testValidScanResult_isNotEmpty

      public void testValidScanResult_isNotEmpty()
      Non-empty scan result should not be empty

    • testScanResult_storedAsEventId

      public void testScanResult_storedAsEventId()
      Scanned value should be stored correctly as eventId Simulates: bundle.putString("eventId", scannedValue)

    • testEventId_notNullAfterValidScan

      public void testEventId_notNullAfterValidScan()
      eventId should not be null after a valid scan

    • testEventId_exactlyMatchesScanResult

      public void testEventId_exactlyMatchesScanResult()
      eventId value should exactly match the scanned QR value

    • testMissingEventIdKey_isDetected

      public void testMissingEventIdKey_isDetected()
      Missing eventId key should be detected Matches: args.containsKey("eventId") returning false

    • testNullArgs_treatedAsMissingEvent

      public void testNullArgs_treatedAsMissingEvent()
      Null args should be treated as no event provided Matches: if (args != null invalid input: '&'invalid input: '&' ...) in EventDetailsFragment

    • testScanResult_usedDirectlyAsEventId

      public void testScanResult_usedDirectlyAsEventId()
      Scan result should be used directly as eventId without modification

    • testDifferentQRCodes_produceDifferentEventIds

      public void testDifferentQRCodes_produceDifferentEventIds()
      Different QR codes should produce different eventIds

    • testSameQRCode_producesSameEventId

      public void testSameQRCode_producesSameEventId()
      Same QR code scanned twice should produce same eventId

    • testScannerPrompt_isNotEmpty

      public void testScannerPrompt_isNotEmpty()
      Scanner prompt text should not be null or empty Matches: options.setPrompt("Press back to cancel")

    • testValidScan_triggersEventDetails

      public void testValidScan_triggersEventDetails()
      Valid scan should trigger showing event details Matches: if (result.getContents() != null) → show EventDetailsFragment

    • testCancelledScan_doesNotTriggerEventDetails

      public void testCancelledScan_doesNotTriggerEventDetails()
      Cancelled scan should not trigger showing event details Matches: else { Toast "Scan cancelled" }
